case_title: TRANSWORLD SYSTEMS, INC. A CORP. DBA vs. SANCHEZ, LIONEL, INDIV.

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUN-04-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 220

9:50 A.M C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. PARTIES PRESENT WERE STEVE KESTEN, SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY, ROGER J. ILLSLEY AND ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF TRANSWORLD SYSTEMS, INC. ALSO PRESENT WEA DEFENDANT LIONEL SANCHEZ, IN PRO PER. COMMISSIONER SUE KAPLAN; D. CARTER, CLERK. LORETTA NAJARA, CSR. CASE SETT;ED BUY STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF THE PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANT, LIONEL SANCHEZ FOR THE SUM OF $1,566.01. PLAINTIFF AGREES TO ACCEPT THE SUE OF $1,177.00 IN INSTALLMENT PAYMENTS OF $75.00 PER MONTH BEGINNING 7/1/98 AND ON THE FIRST DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER, UNTIL PAID IN FULL. SEE CLERK MINUTES FOR FURTHER DETAILS IN EVENT OF DEFAULT BY DEFT.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, LIONEL, INDIV.
